title: T035 Commander full subcommand tree with zod opts
summary: Complete T033 Phase G: all CLI handlers migrated to (runtime, typedOpts) with zod schemas; commander actions wired in program.ts; flagParsing.ts deleted; index.ts uses parseAsync.
decisions: Q1: Per command change action + handler zod opts + router dispatch (no signature-only migrations)
Q2: Tests call handler(runtime, typedOpts) directly; handleCommandAsync remains compat wrapper
Q3: runs resume stays in S2 with other runs subcommands
Q4: zod schema co-located with handler or program action registration
Q5: printEnvelope stays console.log; pino logger out of scope
S1 validateTopLevelCommand: top-level verb only until actions wired

slices.title: Relax top-level validation; restore test baseline
outcomes list, insights list, market-data, pattern-memory list
pattern-memory mutate, delete flagParsing, ARCHITECTURE.md, index main→parseAsync
